whatWeDo.heading: What We Do
whatWeDo.body: Our Real Estate division structures and executes development projects in a responsible and rewarding manner based on careful asset selection, optimal value addition, innovative financing structures and targeted marketing and sales strategies

valueAddition.heading: Our value-addition activities include the following

items.title: Investments
items.description: We invest in lands which we may either hold for a period of time or engage in property developments projects such as Gated Communities other Residential Projects

items.title: Joint Ventures
items.description: Landowners who are interested in developing their properties are invited to contact us to explore potential collaborations

items.title: Structuring and Financing
items.description: Create and structure investments in the Real Estate industry

sellYourLand.heading: Are you a landowner looking to sell your land?
sellYourLand.description: If you own bare land in suburbs
sellYourLand.suburbs: such as Kandana, Ja Ela, Negombo, Seeduwa, Katunayake, Kadawatha, Kaduwela, Pannipitiya, Moratuwa and Thalawathugoda
sellYourLand.paymentNote: We are able to pay the entire amount upfront for your land.
